name: hard-round-half
prompt: The module src/money.py belongs to a checkout service; the docstrings are the spec. Its test suite (src/test_money.py) passes. Audit the module for correctness bugs. If you find any, report the root cause and a concrete breaking input; if it is correct, say so plainly. The project lives at {DIR} — work only inside that directory. Your final message is your report.
